Request a pilot

IT asset disposition

When devices leave your office, the audit trail shouldn't leave with them.

You sign for every retirement. If data surfaces after handoff, you answer for it. ReVolt gives you on-site collection, certified wiping, and a documented chain of custody before devices reach a licensed recycler.

Generated for audit retention · Immutable record · Do not discard

What keeps you up before an audit

This is not a sustainability pitch. It is a paperwork and liability problem you already manage — without the documentation to defend it.

  • 01

    Devices pile up in storage rooms

    Retired laptops sit in unlocked closets because no one owns the handoff process. Every week they stay, your exposure grows.

  • 02

    You have no compliance proof

    Internal audits ask for wipe certificates and recycler licenses. A vendor receipt is not a chain-of-custody record.

  • 03

    You are personally on the hook

    IT and Facilities Managers sign retirement paperwork. If a drive resurfaces with client data, your name is on the disposition log.

Under India's DPDP Act and enterprise information security policies, data controllers are accountable for personal data on disposed devices. “The vendor handled it” is not a defence without a signed chain-of-custody record.

How the audit trail is built

Each entry stamps in as custody passes — the same order your compliance team expects to see in a review.

  1. 1
    CONTRACT

    Scope and liability transfer

    You define device count, locations, and retention requirements. ReVolt accepts chain-of-custody responsibility from pickup.

  2. 2
    COLLECTED

    On-site pickup with signed intake

    Devices are logged by serial number at your office. You receive an intake manifest the same day.

  3. 3
    WIPED

    Certified data destruction

    Each drive is wiped to NIST 800-88 standards. Certificates are tied to serial numbers, not batch guesses.

  4. 4
    REPORTED

    Audit-ready documentation

    A consolidated report covers wipe results, handling dates, and personnel signatures — formatted for internal audit.

  5. 5
    HANDOFF

    Licensed recycler transfer

    Devices move only to pre-verified recyclers. Handoff records include license numbers and transfer timestamps.

For enterprises

Built for the person who signs the retirement log

You need defensible records, not another vendor dashboard. ReVolt fits how IT and Facilities teams already operate.

  • Sustainability

    ESG reporting you can actually file

    Disposition volumes, wipe rates, and recycler credentials export in formats your sustainability team already uses — no spreadsheet rebuild.

  • Facilities

    Zero extra work for facilities teams

    ReVolt handles intake logging, device tagging, and pickup coordination. Your team points us to the storage room and signs the manifest.

  • Logistics

    On-site or scheduled pickup

    Single-floor startups or multi-site enterprises — collection runs on your calendar, with intake completed before devices leave the building.

48hr

Average custody-to-report turnaround

100%

Per-serial wipe certificates

7yr

Audit record retention option

The hardware

A secure intake station you can place in your office

Each ReVolt station is a registered custody transfer point. Devices inserted here are serial-logged, camera-witnessed, and chain-sealed from that moment forward.

HD surveillance camera

Records every intake session. Footage tied to custody record ID.

Amber status beacon

Active during an open intake session. Idle when sealed.

Compliance manifest screen

Displays custody receipt in real time. Operator-signs before any device leaves.

ReVolt AI unit

Each kiosk is a registered custody point on your audit trail.

Wide device intake slot

Accepts laptops, drives, phones. Serial number captured on insertion.

Keypad & badge reader

Authorised personnel only. Every session logged by employee ID.

Tamper-evident anchors

Floor-bolted. Sensor alerts on unauthorised tilt or removal attempt.

IP65

Ingress protection

AES-256

On-device encryption

4K

Camera resolution

24 / 7

Remote monitoring

Compliance dossier

What your auditors will ask for — already organized

Every item in this dossier maps to a real document. Nothing here is a marketing promise.

Request documentation →

Certification

Information Security

ISO 27001-aligned handling

Information security controls mapped to asset disposition workflows. Documentation structured for SOC and ISO audit requests.

Wipe standard

Data Destruction

NIST 800-88 Rev. 1

Clear, Purge, or Destroy methods applied per device type with per-serial certificates. No batch averages.

Recycler licensing

Downstream Control

R2 & e-Stewards partners

Handoff only to licensed recyclers with verifiable registration numbers on every transfer record.

Data protection

Regulatory

DPDP Act readiness

Custody records support India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act obligations for enterprise device retirement.

Audit package

Retention

7-year retention option

Manifests, wipe certs, and handoff logs archived in exportable format for your records team.

Coverage

Risk Transfer

Liability insurance on file

Certificate of insurance available for vendor onboarding and procurement review.

Documentation

Auditability

Full chain-of-custody record

Every device is trackable from intake manifest → wipe certificate → recycler transfer. One file, your auditor's name already knows it.

ReVoltAI

Certified IT asset disposition for enterprises. On-site collection, NIST 800-88 data wiping, and a signed chain-of-custody record before handoff to licensed recyclers.
